title: Buildxact Estimate Item
description: A line item on a Buildxact estimate — material, labor, subcontractor, or assembly. Mirrors the Estimate Item resource exposed by api.buildxact.com.

unit.description: Unit of measure (e.g. each, hour, m2, lf).

unitCost.description: Per-unit cost before markup and tax.

total.description: Quantity multiplied by unit cost, before markup.

markup.description: Markup amount applied to this line.

totalIncMarkup.description: Line total inclusive of markup, exclusive of tax.

totalIncTax.description: Line total inclusive of markup and tax.
